title: Superfast
description: The best optimization modpack! Contains shader support, zoom, and Fullbright, all while almost tripling your FPS!
body:
# Superfast

Superfast is the fastest and best performance optimization modpack there is! Superfast includes amazing QoL features like Fullbright and zoom, which are both ideal for content creators. Superfast almost triples your FPS in all situations and pretty much never lags! Superfast also includes support for shaders, meaning that all you have to do switch on your shaders, and play! You can even join any server with Superfast without getting kicked or banned!

### **_DISCLAIMER:_**

**_Not all features are available on Quilt, use Fabric for maximum compatibility/performance. This includes zooming functionality and Fullbright. Non-Fabric loader compatability is being discontinued._**
